name: funloom-minigame-maker
description: Create, adapt, validate, and package minigames for the Funloom interactive story creator tool.

interface.shortDescription: Build ZIP minigames for Funloom minigame nodes.
interface.longDescription: Create or adapt lightweight HTML/CSS/JavaScript minigames for the Funloom interactive story creator tool. The skill validates ZIP shape, packages source directories, and guides basic success/failure or creator-confirmed advanced result states such as perfect.
defaultPrompt: Adapt this web game for a Funloom minigame node.
Validate and package this minigame source.
